title: rhododendron × pulchrum var. calycinum
intro: Rhododendron × pulchrum var. calycinum, also known as the Calycinum Rhododendron, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Rhododendron family, characterized by its showy flowers and attractive foliage. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Rhododendron × pulchrum var. calycinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and treat various health conditions.
